Video.summary: Mother Nature is back and ready to blow you away, with some of the fiercest, most electrifying, and most extreme weather we have ever seen! So buckle in and let’s get ready to ride!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | It's Raining Cats & Dogs & Boats

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | It's Raining Cats & Dogs & Boats
Extreme Weather Countdown | It's Raining Cats & Dogs & Boats
Extreme Weather Countdown | It's Raining Cats & Dogs & Boats

Video.summary: Stop me if you heard this one before? What's fast, windy, and can ruin your day in seconds? Of course, we're talking about the weather. And over the next half hour, we'll be bringing you some of the craziest moments ever captured on camera; from hailstorms to tornados and everything in between, we're going to show it all, right here on Extreme Weather Countdown.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Come Hell or High Winds

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Come Hell or High Winds
Extreme Weather Countdown | Come Hell or High Winds
Extreme Weather Countdown | Come Hell or High Winds

Video.summary: Mother Nature is back and ready to blow you away, with some of the fiercest, most electrifying, and most extreme weather we have ever seen! So buckle in and let’s get ready to ride!

And over the next half hour, we'll be bringing you some of the craziest moments ever captured on camera; from hailstorms to tornados and everything in between, we're going to show it all, right here on Extreme Weather Countdown.

Extreme Weather Countdown | Come Hell or High Winds

Video.summary: One year after witnessing a record number of deadly twisters in Tornado Alley, Mark & Jaclyn return to the Midwest in search of more extreme storms. The hunt challenges their relationship with Mother Nature, as well as with each other.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Into the Core

Video.summary: The North Atlantic Ocean is generous with her bounty, until she takes a life in return. Mark braves the deep seas on the most dangerous day of the lobster fishing season.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Dangerous Waters

Video.summary: One year after witnessing a record number of deadly twisters in Tornado Alley, Mark & Jaclyn return to the Midwest in search of more extreme storms. The hunt challenges their relationship with Mother Nature, as well as with each other.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Into the Core

Video.summary: The North Atlantic Ocean is generous with her bounty, until she takes a life in return. Mark braves the deep seas on the most dangerous day of the lobster fishing season.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Dangerous Waters

Video.summary: One year after witnessing a record number of deadly twisters in Tornado Alley, Mark & Jaclyn return to the Midwest in search of more extreme storms. The hunt challenges their relationship with Mother Nature, as well as with each other.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Into the Core

Video.summary: The North Atlantic Ocean is generous with her bounty, until she takes a life in return. Mark braves the deep seas on the most dangerous day of the lobster fishing season.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Dangerous Waters

Video.summary: One year after witnessing a record number of deadly twisters in Tornado Alley, Mark & Jaclyn return to the Midwest in search of more extreme storms. The hunt challenges their relationship with Mother Nature, as well as with each other.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Into the Core

Video.summary: Jaclyn Whittal and Mark Robinson are in Tornado Alley to track down some of the most ferocious weather.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Knowing the Enemy

Video.summary: Mark joins George and a team of scientists in exploring the world’s largest lava lake - Mount Nyiragongo.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Ultimate Risk

Video.summary: On his home turf in Canada, Mark and his team chase one of nature’s deadliest forces, coming face to face with tornadoes’ shear strength.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Shear Strength

Video.summary: Regardless of kingdom, phylum, or species, these bonds are unbreakable.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 2.6

Video.summary: Dive deep into the shark infested waters all from the safety of your couch
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 2.11

Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 2.11

Video.summary: These birds are spreading their wings, with or without the ability to fly.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 2.7

Video.summary: Jump headfirst into the deep blue sea and swim along with the majestic dolphins.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 2.12

Video.summary: Who will win in a match of a House vs. a Flooded River or a Tornado Chases down some Speedboaters?
Video.title: Humans VS Weather | For Wetter or Worse

Image.alt: Humans VS Weather | For Wetter or Worse
Humans VS Weather | For Wetter or Worse
Humans VS Weather | For Wetter or Worse
